examples: The key point of customer relationship management is how to quantify customer lifetime value (CLV).
Customer lifetime value (CLV) is the key concept within CRM and it has become a main study area of CRM.
The CLV model is conducive to enterprise's identification of key customers in the marketing and therefore the limited resources can be better exploited.
Not surprisingly, the company had a negative CLV, but no one was measuring or managing it.
The key to solving this challenge came from calculating their Customer Lifetime Value (CLV).
